items.summary: Expand the CORS proxy fallback chain in `useTabs.ts` and `TabContent.tsx` to maximize the number of sites that successfully load in iframes. Add the following additional proxies to the rotation after the existing ones: `https://api.codetabs.com/v1/proxy?quest=<url>`, `https://thingproxy.freeboard.io/fetch/<url>`, and `https://yacdn.org/proxy/<url>`. Attempt each proxy in sequence and only show the error/fallback state after all proxies have been exhausted.

For TikTok (tiktok.com) specifically, implement a dedicated handling strategy in `useTabs.ts` and `TabContent.tsx`. When the URL being loaded matches `tiktok.com` (or `www.tiktok.com`), use an embedded `<iframe>` with `src` set to `https://www.tiktok.com/embed/` as the primary attempt, and also try the full proxy chain using `https://tiktok.com` as the target. Additionally, in `QuickOpen.tsx`, update the TikTok card's URL to use `https://www.tiktok.com` and add a note in the error fallback state that links directly to `https://www.tiktok.com` with `target="_blank"` for cases where embedding is blocked by TikTok's own X-Frame-Options headers.

Add a per-tab retry mechanism in `TabContent.tsx`. When the error state is displayed (all proxies exhausted), show a 'Try Again' button that re-initiates the full proxy fallback chain for the current URL. Also add a 'Open in New Window' button that opens the raw (non-proxied) URL directly in a new browser tab via `window.open(url, '_blank')`.
